---
layout: default
title: "National Political Brief: July 13, 2026"
date: 2026-07-13T16:44:56.203469+00:00
summary: "The Supreme Court intervenes in key state policies, while political parties ramp up bypoll campaigns and Rajya Sabha nomination efforts nationwide"
run_time_ist: "10:14PM"
---

<article class="digest-post">
  <a class="back-link" href="{{ '/' | relative_url }}">Political Brief</a>
  <p class="post-meta">Gemini Summary: 10:14PM</p>


<h2 class="section-title">India National Politics</h2>

<ul class="digest-points">
  <li><strong>Supreme Court rulings:</strong> The Supreme Court stayed the Madras High Court&#x27;s blanket ban on cow slaughter in Tamil Nadu, while refusing to entertain a PIL seeking a national policy to ban the viewing of pornography.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I1</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I2</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I3</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMibEFVX3lxTE85eUt0aGNRREhXQUx6ZE5fVnRTam9aZWFubVZEaFdDdk1XS2prNXBKMnBiY1AxYmlMWFdHdFRPUXpYODBYYWhkM0dDdXFtV3hyc0NyOFRzUVR3UEhJclJOYXZkaHdmQmZuSVMtcA?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiwwFBVV95cUxOZDVaQUhqME9EakZuVGZ0RWhZdk5pMW1tcG1HYVlENjd3eXYwRjhrZW50S0hVWU5TWlQzU0ZVNkdnYm01Z2tYTjhjZGRJLTQzSlZuQW5ud3JRdWRCNFkwY2dQb0RMVmtTRG5xWkplMlJFSjJYYlNNUXBvWmZfSzgxd0huLWh0U3N4TndxUWYzeVRwNEpZOWh2TEVHTGc2STVKdnRfSG5GWnhVNHJIdVdKb2o1bnh1Q3hTVGxQN2tRZFJNdDA?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I31</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I32</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I33</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I36</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I37</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Rajya Sabha nominations:</strong> Three former TMC leaders have filed nominations as BJP candidates for the Rajya Sabha bypolls in West Bengal, a move aimed at strengthening the party&#x27;s position in the Upper House.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I11</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I12</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I13</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMivAFBVV95cUxQb2pmblRjLUcwcFk3UUF4M1ZLTWNlTk1mbjlsTjBrNW92bE85aXFRVFI3WEpORzV0VWVuNTNVM29kZ2NGNlk2S25tdEJrN1d2aUhQVmdiUi0tUlF1ZW9zcUNfRnBJa0JKU016SW9tQ19YejRPcWtKSDNzMWdkeWRKdFQwMlNMX3Fqdmd2dTFwWWJGQzNEMEc4VEE0c01hUmJaOFdYQmV3RWQwOWFRbnlaMFRmSldMbXFHRmNkSA?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I14</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I21</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I22</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Legislative and diplomatic updates:</strong> Parliament passed the Transgender Persons Amendment Bill, 2026, and India held its 8th Defence Policy Dialogue with Japan in Tokyo to bolster strategic cooperation.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I4</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMitwFBVV95cUxOTVUxZlIzbWxxY19jSlNqZFdaRnpxd3MydDBIejl5WjN6OXVtbVBFWFpPcXJINWp1UGpVcDQ1T2R2YVNFOTNJNEtNT2F4YnVldnBIWXJBOGtCNTBUUk1UOE5NQ19tRVpoMXZGMG5wMEJ4cXROTnBqck1PLXE1TUk5MW1FLS1uOWRLaGlsSFdrM29FUUtYYnJ1cHJBLVZHXzJ0RFM3aU1YeDZpYTNVem1seUwtd0V2RG8?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I5</a> <a <h2 class="section-title">Policy and Institutions</h2>

<ul class="digest-points">
  <li><strong>Judicial oversight on pricing:</strong> The Supreme Court has directed the Centre to submit its airfare regulation rules in a sealed cover within two weeks to address concerns regarding surge pricing.</li>
  <li><strong>Bypoll campaigning:</strong> Political activity has intensified with the launch of the Manjalpur bypoll campaign in Gujarat and the filing of nominations for the Datia by-election in Madhya Pradesh.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMitwFBVV95cUxQMl9GbHoxaFBOX21OU1dyLVRHekQyU29xMVpSVFluS1JnVEhSRm5rMEdkRERUbFBkNWdZeGM3RDNZc2pITjhtNlJmbjFCbFduRURUOWx6dGFnS19vVUY2aDVoMEtyNDVObkp1M0lNZ3EzZlJWWldiRm5yLXd1ZEVWTnNCZnVXMmdWTW9NSm1iMU82Y2hnX01xRXYzRWJ1YXZfc2NoZmhJQ0dRNzdLa0JaajVvS1NmYlk?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W1</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiowFBVV95cUxQWTc0VDhabUtWU0R5dTIzZHI1LUc5ak1XbTFVVE1zZHVoOFd2Qm9ZSnRsUUh4dFBnQ0Q3X3dLbWc4dy1reGc2b0o3R3ZNdkhsbjhSVDRzc2IySFRDb2FNSHRYb3RQbWVXM2taYlZHRTVMRTgxbk9wS1VkajY4dUNabFNiUGNPS1VrMFhzZ3pRZWc1bkV6dWkyR0ZHV25pa09yQmU0?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W2</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMirgFBVV95cUxOcVZlaURWZFZ4TDJyU0xmQmwyc2piMHUtbTU3N3pzS3dxLVdmYTZyVk8yYy1kbXhtSEdvVlhnQUlWX3VUOUlHZm9SV1lsRkFUdEs3aVZCZHI2aDB0anUwZkNVdE1yWUFmamNkU0lDZmo5Snc5MUFMeDd1U0Zib2hTWVRRMmw1b2R3R3VBcnhVMmN1cXlTdzZCMG9QWllfS29OMHpiR0EwMC1MdlBMY0E?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W3</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMi_?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W4</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W11</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W15</a></span></li>
</ul>
